description: Decided-store for channel discovery dedup (brainstorm 2026-06-01 R8). Covers non-registry platforms only — registered platforms are always 'decided' via publishing.registry.registered_platforms(). Next run must dedup against this + the registry before probing.

entries.reason: Service shut down Dec 2021; homepage returns CF 403 to all UAs; no publish API ever existed.
entries.reopen: Live homepage 200 + documented publish API + successful pipeline canary.

entries.reason: Public publishing is paid-tier only; free accounts cannot create publicly accessible pages.
entries.reopen: A free public-output tier returns.

entries.reason: Free accounts quarantined: noindex + nofollow by default; founder-documented anti-SEO-spam stance; mass de-index 2025.
entries.reopen: Non-quarantined free path yields dofollow+indexed (unlikely by design).

entries.reason: Paid only ($7/mo) AND injects rel=nofollow on author outbound links (verified 2/23).
entries.reopen: Free tier + dofollow — neither plausible.

entries.reason: JS-SPA; outbound rel not server-rendered (unverifiable); partial indexation; cookie-session writes = heavy adapter.
entries.reopen: Canary proves dofollow + reliable indexation via headless render.

entries.reason: Client-rendered SPA (302 to pastee.dev, 0 bytes server HTML); weak/noindex; redundant with rentry/txtfyi/telegraph.
entries.reopen: Server-rendered indexed output appears.

entries.reason: Free *.weebly.com: low DA, forced footer, deindexation-prone (2025 thin-content wave); heavy browser+account adapter; unverified dofollow.
entries.reopen: N/A — classic Web2.0 PBN layer, no ROI.

entries.reason: Per-/view/ content weakly indexed; outbound links redirect-wrapped (dofollow unconfirmable); heavy browser+account adapter.
entries.reopen: New Google Sites stops wrapping links AND per-site indexation proven.

entries.reason: GitLab Snippets barely indexed by Google (issues #4650/#24289); near-zero SEO value. (GitLab Pages is a separate GO.)
entries.reopen: Google indexation of snippets materially improves.

entries.reason: CN platform removed from codebase (operator has no account; nofollow link-interstitial; zero equity).
entries.reopen: Not planned.

entries.reason: CN platform removed from codebase (operator has no account; nofollow link-interstitial; zero equity).
entries.reopen: Not planned.

entries.reason: CN platform removed from codebase (operator has no account; nofollow link-interstitial; zero equity).
entries.reopen: Not planned.

entries.reason: CN platform removed from codebase (operator has no account; nofollow link-interstitial; zero equity).
entries.reopen: Not planned.

entries.reason: Reputation risk: adult-adjacent bad-neighborhood; dofollow confirmed but bad-neighborhood penalty may outweigh equity gain.
entries.reopen: Operator decides after reviewing bad-neighborhood classification risk vs. referral value.

entries.reason: JS-SPA: dofollow status unverifiable via static fetch; requires headless-render canary to confirm link rel.
entries.reopen: Headless-render canary confirms dofollow on a real published link.

entries.reason: JS-SPA: dofollow status unverifiable via static fetch; requires headless-render canary to confirm link rel.
entries.reopen: Headless-render canary confirms dofollow on a real published link.

entries.reason: Confirmed nofollow noopener (12/86) on outbound links — zero PageRank transfer. High JP referral value. Registered dofollow=False.
entries.reopen: N/A — already handled as dofollow=False registration if/when adapter is built.

entries.reason: Confirmed nofollow noopener noreferrer (36/137) — zero PageRank transfer. High JP referral value. Would register dofollow=False.
entries.reopen: N/A — already handled as dofollow=False registration if/when adapter is built.

entries.reason: Wave-3 deferred: requires real Sphinx docs (medium adapter cost); operator has no docs project ready.
entries.reopen: Operator has a real docs project to publish + Sphinx build is wired.

entries.reason: Wave-3 deferred: diversification-only (low referral value); form POST spec unverified without network probe.
entries.reopen: Form POST endpoint and field names verified via direct inspection.
